scope: multi-seed final labels for VQE-QAS oracle benchmark tables after unmeasured-state energy fix

invalidates.reason: v1 labels used the post-measurement collapsed final_state for VQE energy, suppressing X/Y Hamiltonian terms.

label_backend.note: NPU/complex64 screening labels must not be used as final oracle labels.

versioning_rules: fair_vqe_protocol_v1 rows are contaminated and must not train or validate v2 oracles.
Rows from different protocol_version values must not train or validate the same oracle.
Any future change to optimizer, budget, backend, dtype, reference, Hamiltonian construction, initialization, or energy-evaluation state requires a new protocol_version.
